Implement T1 in useClipResize.ts and preserve overlap handling semantics

item.text: {"output":"Implemented batch 1 task T1 in `useClipResize.ts`. The hook now captures `to`/`speed`/`trackKind`/`assetDuration` at resize start, applies audio-specific endpoint clamping without mutating the resize callback input, recalculates visual clip speed from the overlap-resolved timeline span, and overwrites the resized visual clip’s overlap patch with speed-based metadata. Verified with the full `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `resolve-overlaps.test.ts` modules, and wrote a batch checkpoint to `.megaplan/plans/fix-video-and-audio-clip-20260406-0616/execution_batch_1.json`.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipResize.ts",".megaplan/plans/fix-video-and-audio-clip-20260406-0616/execution_batch_1.json"],"commands_run":["sed '1,240p'"],"deviations":[],"task_updates":[{"task_id":"T1","status":"done","executor_notes":"Updated `useClipResize` to cache source bounds/speed/track kind/asset duration at resize start, branch resize commit math by track kind, clamp audio endpoints without mutating the callback input, and recompute the resized visual clip patch from overlap-resolved action bounds before applying edits. Verified with the full `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `resolve-overlaps.test.ts` modules.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipResize.ts"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts","npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/__tests__/resolve-overlaps.test.ts"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC1","executor_note":"Implemented the visual resize formulas against `resolvedRows`: right-edge speed is `(origin.to - origin.from) / resolvedDuration`, and left-edge uses `newFrom = origin.from + (resolvedStart - origin.start) * origin.speed` with `newSpeed = (origin.to - newFrom) / resolvedDuration`."}]}
